This will be where you decide where you want your bot to go (which server) and whether you are in the testing phase.

Use the config.py file, where you can also find further instructions!

Add your token.env and all_f2p_worlds.txt files here! 
    * all_f2p_worlds.txt is considered a configurable file. edit this file whenever Jagex adds a new f2p world.
    * DO NOT EDIT THE FILE WHEN JAGEX TEMPORARILY REMOVES AN F2P WORLD.

See `token_example.env` as a sample setup for your env file. Make sure you change the filename to `token.env` OR edit the `config.py` file accordingly!
